options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <file1.tcl file2.tcl ...> # Files need to check (string, optional) <nagelfar.tcl options> # nagelfar.tcl options

options.name: -options
options.description: List out all the legal nagelfar options

options.name: -out_file
options.description: Send the output to file, rather than the default of stdout
